name: Mount Rainier
eruptionHistory: Last confirmed eruption in the 1890s. Considered one of the most dangerous volcanoes in the US due to massive glacier-fed lahar potential threatening Tacoma and Seattle suburbs.
description: Mount Rainier is an active stratovolcano and the most glaciated peak in the contiguous US. It is classified as a Decade Volcano due to the extreme risk lahars pose to nearby populated areas.
